metadata.title: Premium Nursing Homes in KL | PJ, Kepong, Cheras, Kajang | 吉隆坡碧绿连锁疗养院
metadata.description: Established in 2017, Mintygreen Wellness Residence is a chain of senior care services provider in Klang Valley.  Our specialty is providing 24 hours nursing care and rehabilitation services has been highly commendable with years of good track record.  We are proud to announce Mintygreen Wellness Residence is the first nursing home that put great emphasis on Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM).

### SENIOR CARE SERVICES

 We are proud to announce Mintygreen Healthcare Group is the first senior care center that put great emphasis on Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM). 

###### [EXPLORE SERVICES](https://www.mintygreen-wellness.com)

[Location](https://www.mintygreen-wellness.com)

1/3

Good Environment

###### [Read More](https://www.mintygreen-wellness.com/services)

[Location](https://www.mintygreen-wellness.com/services)

The environment of Mintygreen Wellness Residence is a comfortable home, allowing your loved ones to enjoy a noble life. A good environment can help to promote physical and mental conditions. This allows your loved ones to live peacefully.​

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/90ca2d_1950ce87026a4cb6b7f0d9763bf6702e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_98,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/90ca2d_1950ce87026a4cb6b7f0d9763bf6702e~mv2.jpg)

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/f2ae9e_f39cb567596745938a0d4e558ff4475b~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_110,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/f2ae9e_f39cb567596745938a0d4e558ff4475b~mv2.jpg)

1/3

Activities

###### [Read More](https://www.mintygreen-wellness.com/services)

[Location](https://www.mintygreen-wellness.com/services)

We provide a variety of fun, creative and enjoyable activities. Your loved ones can be themselves and exploit their talents. It can help to improve physical and mental health and slow down the body's ageing process   ​​​

​

*   Exercise
    
*   Gardening 
    
*   Mahjong 
    

![WhatsApp Image 2025-02-18 at 09.50.54_6c284360](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/90ca2d_84e8d761526f48c3bd61064d6b629fd8~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_98,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/90ca2d_84e8d761526f48c3bd61064d6b629fd8~mv2.jpg)

1/2

Physiotherapy

###### [Read More](https://www.mintygreen-wellness.com/services)

[Location](https://www.mintygreen-wellness.com/services)

We provide professional physiotherapy to your loved ones including daily light physiotherapy, simple exercises and turning. Physiotherapy can lower: the risk of falling and physical obstacles, and the pain caused by the wound or diseases.​

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/f2ae9e_7f343534d70c4072ad4af430741b8b4a~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_98,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/f2ae9e_7f343534d70c4072ad4af430741b8b4a~mv2.jpg)

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/f2ae9e_7f343534d70c4072ad4af430741b8b4a~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_98,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/f2ae9e_7f343534d70c4072ad4af430741b8b4a~mv2.jpg)

1/2

Acupuncture & TUINA

###### [Read More](https://www.mintygreen-wellness.com/services)

[Location](https://www.mintygreen-wellness.com/services)

Our traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) physicians provide professional TCM services including Acupuncture and Tui Na for your loved ones. TCM can help your loved one to prevent the disease and lower the risk of a disease outbreak.​

![ZPH09493](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/90ca2d_10233397184743a4af6c4b717cc111b9~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_98,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/90ca2d_10233397184743a4af6c4b717cc111b9~mv2.jpg)

ZPH09493

1/2

Psychology

###### [Read More](https://www.mintygreen-wellness.com/counsellorkl)

[Location](https://www.mintygreen-wellness.com/counsellorkl)

Mintygreen Psychological & Counselling Services Centre provides psychological and counselling services for your loved ones to overcome mental problems and disorders. Good mental health allows your loved ones to build strong confidence and reduce anxiety & depression. 

​​

" Mental health is wealth" 

![Blurry Lights](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/670a2aff665f465e9b982a1292d57ea4.jpg/v1/fill/w_147,h_98,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/670a2aff665f465e9b982a1292d57ea4.jpg)

### Supporting Partners

#### Hear From Our Team

At Mintygreen, our professionals are not just staff — they are the heart of our care. Here, they share how working and learning with us has shaped their skills, strengthened their passion, and brought meaning to their everyday work.

![WhatsApp Image 2024-09-11 at 11.12.29_b3896ad5.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/90ca2d_e62aa62f22e74c6c81b18b793ae10e6a~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_403,h_334,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/WhatsApp%20Image%202024-09-11%20at%2011_12_29_b3896ad5.jpg)

Physiotherapist

Raj 

Working closely with the elderly has taught me to connect with them not just as patients, but as individuals with unique stories and needs.

Through daily conversations, I improved my communication skills—learning to listen with empathy, respond with patience, and build trust.

As a physiotherapist, this connection helped me go beyond treatment plans to truly understand each person. I dealt with complex cases like stroke rehab and chronic pain, which pushed me to adapt and grow. With guidance and feedback, I became more confident in my clinical decisions and creative in finding ways to motivate and support my patients.

​

This journey has been more than just gaining technical skills. It’s helped me grow into a more compassionate and knowledgeable physiotherapist. I’ve learned to see beyond the diagnosis, and I’ve realized how much the elderly can teach us—about resilience, patience, and the importance of human connection in healing.

![WhatsApp Image 2025-04-18 at 10.40.57_c0379dd5.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/90ca2d_388979352ebc4fb98177a7c71ea48243~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_0,y_201,w_810,h_671/fill/w_403,h_334,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/WhatsApp%20Image%202025-04-18%20at%2010_40_57_c0379dd5.jpg)

Nurse

Syakirah

When I first started my career as a nurse, I was nervous and unsure of myself. With time, experience, and support from my colleagues, I became more confident in handling different situations, especially during emergencies.

Every patient I’ve cared for has taught me something valuable—not just medically, but emotionally too. Nursing is more than just giving medications or checking vitals; it’s about being present during a person’s most difficult moments.

I’ve comforted patients in pain, supported families through grief, and shared small moments of joy and relief. These emotional experiences have shaped me into a more compassionate and resilient nurse.

![WhatsApp Image 2025-04-18 at 10.41.13_c1509d83.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/90ca2d_1569e3cf75e24530a5260b7af893673c~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_0,y_484,w_1920,h_1591/fill/w_403,h_334,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/WhatsApp%20Image%202025-04-18%20at%2010_41_13_c1509d83.jpg)

Physiotherapist

Kai Xuan

I never expected this work to change me the way it has. When I first started as a physiotherapist, I thought I was simply here to help others heal. But over time, I realized—I am the one being healed. Every patient who fights their way back from the impossible teaches me something new about resilience, hope, and the quiet strength of the human spirit. And in those fragile, triumphant moments, I find my own purpose.

​

From bed-bound to walking independently, from silence to sharing their voice—I cherish every small victory. Nothing compares to the joy of witnessing their progress. When a patient thanks me, ready to leave with renewed strength, it breaks me in the best way: my heart swells, and the tears come without warning. This is why I do what I do.

​

These patients have been my greatest teachers. They’ve shown me that healing is not linear—it’s a mosaic of setbacks and breakthroughs, patience and grit. They’ve taught me that the human spirit is unbreakable, even when the body falters. And most of all, they’ve reminded me that my role isn’t just to treat, but to witness—to hold space for their struggle, and to honor their courage as they reclaim their lives. These lessons will stay with me long after they’ve walked out the door.
